svg.title: GigShield Platform Architecture
svg.desc: Four-pillar platform diagram: Watchman trigger service, Engine backend with ML models, Partner rider PWA, and Vault insurer portal, sitting on a shared data and deployment layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GigShield Watchman trigger service')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GigShield FastAPI backend and ML models')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GigShield rider PWA')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the GigShield insurer vault portal')

svg.text: Click any pillar to explore · All ports shown
